extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE attacked final 300 meters of summit finish after Sky-led peloton caught CATALDO who had solo'd from km 73 over Col du Manoir
tactical_patterns: CATALDO's 73km breakaway collapsed 300m from line despite 1:30 gap post-HC descent, proving GC threat limits Sky tolerance window
Sky and AG2R jointly closed 2-minute gap final 2km when CATALDO threatened overall, revealing threshold for inter-team cooperation
ALAPHILIPPE concealed form all stage then attacked final 300m uphill, exploiting Sky's tempo control leaving no lead-out organization

rider_signals.CATALDO Dario: neutral: Strong HC solo but caught 300m from win shows descending skill insufficient against organized GC pursuit
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Hid until final 300m then won against BARDET/MARTIN/THOMAS, demonstrating superior positioning over pure climbing
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: Took yellow jersey after Kwiatkowski, indicating Sky rotating GC options rather than committing early
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Finished top group despite Sky pacemaking duty, suggesting dual GC protection capability
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: Third place but unable to distance MARTIN/THOMAS on home climbs, revealing declining form relative to rivals
